text:
Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
i am hoping our government continues to lead the country in the right direction.
### Emotion:
trusting
### User:
the greatest country in the world! USA!!!
### You:
Yes, things are looking quite good and will only get better from here.
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:

### Emotion:
proud
### User:

### Emotion:
annoyed

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.

### Emotion:
surprised

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.

### Emotion:
furious

### You:

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:

### Emotion:
terrified
### User:

### You:

</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:

### Emotion:
grateful
### User:

### You:

</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.

### Emotion:

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.

### Emotion:
prepared
### User:

### You:

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
My baby just started his first day of school, yesterday, I tried my best to make him feel ready and get used to going to school throughout the summer. Big brother helped too and i let him pick out a special backpack and had everything ready to go the first day, it sure made everything run smoother.
### Emotion:
prepared
### User:
Preschool, we put him in a Montessori preschool and absolutely loved it, luckily my older son has went there for 2 years and this will be his last year, so starting next week they get to go together!
### You:
That's great! Did you cry when you took him?
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:

### Emotion:
angry
### User:
I was so mad last week when I got a flat. It was in traffic too
### You:

</s>

Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:

### Emotion:
furious
### User:

</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.

### Emotion:
trusting
### User:

### You:

</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
Usually it's just my cat an I at my house, but it seemed extra empty when she had to stay at a friend's house for a week.
### Emotion:
lonely
### User:
Just a little, since she was around other cats for the first time. I think I was more of a wreck than she was though.  The house seemed so empty without her.
### You:
Aw, that's no fun. I bet the constant construction didn't help at all
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
I'm a truck driver and even though I'm married, I feel very lonely much of the time. I may have to find something else to do, as the long trips away from my wife are troublesome.
### Emotion:
lonely
### User:
I can't imagine! I have a hard time sitting for long hours too. What are you looking in too?
### You:
That's the tricky part, I don't really know. I don't have a good college education or anything and truck driving pays well, it's just not healthy for my current lifestyle. My cousin does heating and cooling and offered to help me there, so I think I'll take him up on that.
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
I had to eat dinner by myself again.  I hate being by myself.
### Emotion:
lonely
### User:
That's too bad. That sounds lonely.
### You:
I hate being by myself.
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
I had a problem at work last week. I solved the problem by breaking a couple rules.
### Emotion:
guilty
### User:

### You:
Yes I guess I am.
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:
Everyone has gone out for the evening and I am home alone.  It feels good to have peace and quiet but it sure seems lonely.
### Emotion:
lonely
### User:
It is nights like this when I am alone that I will cherish when I start back to school.  But tonight seems a bit lonely with no one around.
### You:
Sorry to hear that. I'm in the same boat. At least I have two dogs with me. Do you have any friends around
</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.
Write an emotional and appropriate response.
### Situation:

### Emotion:
sentimental
### User:

### You:

</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.

content
### User:

lonely

</s>

Below is a situation you are in, paired with an input that provides current emotion and further context.

### Situation:
There has been this sinkhole in my yard since the hurricane hit last year and it is the cities responsibility to take care of it. I called it in about a week after the hurricane and it is almost a year since then. Yesterday someone came out and marked it with flags and Im certain that means they will begin to work on it soon. 
### Emotion:
hopeful
### User:
There has been this sinkhole in my yard since the hurricane hit last year and it is the cities responsibility to take care of it. I called it in about a week after the hurricane and it is almost a year since then. Yesterday someone came out and marked it with flags and Im certain that means they will begin to work on it soon.

how big is it ?
